response_risk_found: Earlier status could sound too complete if read as public launch or fully operational startup readiness.
The product had strong reports and a dashboard, but it needed a daily operator workflow queue to feel like an actual usable product.
Helper repos recognized screenshots and board artifacts but did not yet treat the operator work queue as a first-class generated artifact.
direction_taken: Fast-forwarded proven feature branches into main.
Kept AI subject synthesis as first-pass review only.
Kept legal, financial, customs, tariff, buyer, supplier, contract, data-rights, production deployment, and public-launch claims closed.
Added operator_workflow_report as the product workbench artifact and propagated it through coordinator, SRG, and code-review graph contracts.

working_now: AI-simulated expert review packet with human approval gates
private VC pitch packet with diligence boundaries
board go-live packet for controlled private beta review
operator workflow queue for source cards, evidence gates, continuation lanes, human approvals, Canadian tools, proof commands, and closed claims
static operator dashboard with work queue and screenshot gallery
local tests, product checks, and CI proof gates
not_claimed: customs, tariff, CFIA, import/export, legal, privacy, or financial advice
signed contracts or source/data rights approval
real_startup_gap_that_cannot_be_faked_by: source rights and repeatable refresh proof
private beta deployment controls and support owner

completion_verdict.why_not_launch_ready: Generated reports prove local product operation and board/private-beta review readiness, but external-world proof requires buyers, qualified Canadian reviewers, contracts, data rights, security/ops approval, and board/operator approval.
completion_verdict.next_valid_move: Use system_review_graph/operator_workflow_report.json as the daily work queue; assign owners for the human approval gates before any external launch claim changes.
